Uses of Class
org.apache.juneau.petstore.dto.Pet

Packages that use Pet
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.petstore.dto
Petstore domain beans (DTOs).
org.apache.juneau.petstore.rest
Petstore REST resources.
org.apache.juneau.petstore.service
Petstore service layer (in-memory store).

  • Uses of Pet in org.apache.juneau.petstore.dto

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.petstore.dto that return Pet
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Pet
    Pet.setId(long value)
    Sets the pet ID.
    Pet
    Pet.setName(String value)
    Sets the name of the pet.
    Pet
    Pet.setPhoto(String value)
    Sets the URI of the pet photo.
    Pet
    Pet.setPrice(float value)
    Sets the price of the pet.
    Pet
    Pet.setSpecies(Species value)
    Sets the species of the pet.
    Pet
    Pet.setStatus(PetStatus value)
    Sets the lifecycle status of the pet.
    Pet
    Pet.setTags(List<String> value)
    Sets the tags associated with the pet.
